title: lobelia heterophylla
intro: Lobelia heterophylla, also known as Indian tobacco or wild lobelia, is a flowering plant native to North America, characterized by its small blue or white flowers and narrow, pointed leaves. The medicinal properties of Lobelia heterophylla include its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to help reduce stress and anxiety, improve breathing, and alleviate symptoms of asthma and other respiratory conditions. Lobelia heterophylla is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in herbal smoking blends and inhalers to support respiratory health.
